content.text: Основной текст заканчивается на стр. 9 — ровно в лимите NeurIPS. References начинаются со стр. 10 (не считаются). Коммичу.

content.name: Bash
content.input:
[object Object]{"command": "cd /Users/krestnikov/giga/compression-drives-truth && git add paper_neurips/main.tex && git add -f paper_neurips/main.pdf && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Final polish: checklist, formulations, LaTeX fixes for NeurIPS submission

- Checklist theory/proofs: Yes → N/A (paper is empirical, MDL predictions
  are informal, not formal theorems)
- Fix \ref{sec:limitations} on starred section → plain text reference
- Section title: "Transfer to Real Text: Wikipedia" →
  "Transfer to Wikipedia Text with Entity Substitution"
- Soften: "converges toward 50%" → "remains near chance across scales"
- Soften: "reflects textual simplicity" → "is consistent with"
- Soften: "architecture-independent" → "not specific to GPT-2-like"
- Fix theatrical p < 10^-100 → p < 10^-6
- Clarify Qwen3-0.6B: "420M non-embedding parameters"
- Verified: main text fits 9 content pages

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git push", "description": "Commit and push final polish"}
